summary: Ran 4 CLI test files (34 total tests). 26 passed, 8 failed. Failures fall into 3 categories: missing CLI attribute, assertion mismatches on output text, and ImportError for missing enterprise service symbols.
issues: test_cli_stage_run.py: 4 tests fail with ImportError — 'id_allocator' and 'signing' cannot be imported from core.services.enterprise (module exists but symbols missing)
test_cli.py::test_cli_run_pipeline: AssertionError — 'Tenants tracked' not in pipeline summary output (output text mismatch)
test_cli.py::test_cli_show_overlay: AssertionError — overlay config missing 'limits.evidence.encrypt' key (config structure mismatch)
test_cli.py::test_cli_demo_command: SystemExit 2 — CLI argument parsing error in demo mode (known issue from swarm-113)
